text.message: Red, thought you'd take the 9 wheat
Oj with it is gonna be tough
Yeah, you don't have the best options
Didn’t know where else to go
Yeah, I guess I can't blame you
I think I'm virtually out of this one now
I mean, there's always a chance, but this looks bad
Blue, you plow me and then rip me when I'm in last?
Why arn't you stealing from red?
Sorry man it’s my only shot
maybe try to stop red too
nah I was just waiting for it to be off u
I have black aggro attacking me
But robbing my only port...that was a bridge too far
I know, I had a terrible choices with where you put your placements and the rest of the board
I mean it was obvious he was trying to plow u  and u didn't take my trade
Think it was my best chance
2 rb not the cards i wanred
I got whatever you need oj
With red on 4 devs you pass huh?
i preffer lose than winning cheating
you take my trades all game...now you get principled?
Yes...every trade you asked for that I could give I gave you
i take one trade with you and it was before you be mad
